info.title: KMH Tel-U Profile Web API
info.description: KMH Tel-U Profile Web API Documentation

get.description: Retrieves a list of active home banners for the landing page. This endpoint is public and does not require authentication. Only banners that are currently active (based on the current date and the banner's start_date and end_date) will be returned.

200.description: A JSON array of active home banner data

get.description: Retrieves a list of users with optional pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Number of users to skip before starting to collect the result set

200.description: A JSON array of user data

post.description: Creates a new user in the system.

requestBody.description: User object that needs to be added

get.description: Retrieves a user by their unique ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing user in the system.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to retrieve

requestBody.description: User object that needs to be updated

delete.description: Deletes a user by their unique ID. WARNING: HARD DELETE - This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the user to delete

get.description: Retrieves a list of home banners with optional pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of home banners to return

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Number of home banners to skip before starting to collect the result set

200.description: A JSON array of home banner data

post.description: Creates a new home banner in the system.

requestBody.description: Home banner object that needs to be added

media.description: Image file for the home banner (JPEG, PNG, GIF)

delete.description: Deletes a home banner by its unique ID. WARNING: HARD DELETE - This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the home banner to delete

get.description: Retrieves all divisions. This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.
Retrieves a division by its unique ID. Public.

delete.description: Deletes a division by its unique ID. WARNING: HARD DELETE - This action cannot be undone.

post.description: Uploads and sets the division icon. Multipart form field name: icon.

200.description: Division icon uploaded and updated successfully

get.description: Retrieves a member by ID. Public.

delete.description: Deletes a member. WARNING: HARD DELETE - This action cannot be undone.

post.description: Uploads and sets the member photo. Multipart form field name: photo.

200.description: Member photo uploaded and updated successfully

post.description: Generic media upload. Returns a media object with id/url to attach to blog posts (featured_media_id), events (cover_media_id), or gallery items (media_id). Multipart form field name: file.
Uploads and sets the organization logo. Multipart form field name: logo.

200.description: Organization profile logo uploaded and updated successfully

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a token.

delete.description: Deletes the organization profile by ID. WARNING: HARD DELETE - This action cannot be undone.

tags.name: Public APIs
tags.description: Unprotected APIs for landing page and other public features

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: APIs related to user authentication and token management

tags.name: Homepage Banners
tags.description: APIs related to homepage banner management

tags.name: Media
tags.description: APIs related to generic media upload

tags.name: Organization Profile
tags.description: APIs related to organization profile management
